Ethereal.text:
If an Ethereal card is in your hand at the end of your turn, it is #Exhausted.
#Exhausted cards are removed from your deck until the end of combat.

Fatal.text: Fatal effects occur when a card kills a '''non-minion''' enemy.

Innate.text: Start each combat with this card in your hand.

Retain.text: Retained cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.

Transform.text: Transformed cards become a random card of any rarity.

Upgrade.text: Upgrading cards makes them more powerful. Most cards can only be upgraded once.

Unplayable.text: Unplayable cards cannot be played from your hand.

Buffer.text: Prevent the next X times you would lose HP.

Confused.text: Whenever you draw a card, randomize its cost.

Dexterity.text: Increase #Block gained from cards by X.

Dexterity Down.text: At the end of this turn, lose X #Dexterity.

Draw Card.text: Draw X additional cards next turn.

Frail.text: Gain 25% less #Block from cards for X turns.

Intangible.text: Reduce ALL damage taken and HP loss to 1.

No Draw.text: You may not draw additional cards this turn.

Plated Armor.text: At the end of your turn, receive X #Block. Receiving unblocked damage reduces #Plated Armor by 1.

Regen.text:
Regen heals X HP at the end of your turn.
Each turn, #Regen is reduced by 1.

Shackled.text: At the end of its turn, gains X #Strength.

Strength Down.text: At the end of this turn, lose X #Strength.

Thorns.text: Inflict X damage on the attacker when hit.

Vigor.text: Your next attack deals X additional damage per hit.

Vulnerable.text: Take 50% more damage from '''Attacks''' for X turns.

Weak.text: Deal 25% less damage with '''Attacks''' for X turns.

Flame Barrier.text: When attacked, deals X damage back.

Barricade.text: #Block is not removed at the beginning of your turn.

Berserk.text: At the start of your turn, gain X @RE '''Energy'''.

Brutality.text: At the start of your turn, lose X HP and draw X cards.

Combust.text: At the end of your turn, lose X HP and deal damage to ALL enemies.

Dark Embrace.text: Whenever a card is #Exhausted, draw X cards.

Demon Form.text: At the start of your turn, gain X #Strength.

Feel No Pain.text: Whenever you #Exhaust a card, gain X #Block.

Juggernaut.text: Whenever you gain #Block, deal X damage to a random enemy.

Metallicize.text: At the end of every turn, gain X #Block.

Rupture.text: Whenever you lose HP from a card, gain X #Strength.

Blur.text: #Block is not removed at the beginning of your next X turns.

Corpse Explosion.text: On death, deal damage equal to Max HP X times to ALL enemies.

Choked.text: Whenever you play a card this turn, loses X HP.

Nightmare.text: Add X copies of the chosen card into your hand next turn.

Phantasmal.text: Deal '''Double Damage''' for the next X turns.

Poison.text:
Lose X HP at the start of their turn.
Each turn, #Poison is reduced by 1.

After Image.text: Whenever you play a card, gain X #Block.

Envenom.text: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, apply X #Poison.

Noxious Fumes.text: At the start of your turn, apply X #Poison to ALL enemies.

Retain Cards.text: At the start of your turn, you may #Retain X cards.

Thousand Cuts.text: Whenever you play a card, deal X damage to ALL enemies.

Tools Of The Trade.text: At the start of your turn, draw X cards and discard X cards.

Wraith Form.text: At the start of your turn, lose X #Dexterity.

Orb.text:
You start with 3 Orb Slots.

#Lightning: Deal 3(8 on #Evoke) damage to a random enemy.
#Frost: Gain 2(5 on #Evoke) #Block.
#Dark: Increases damage by 6 every turn. On #Evoke, deal damage to the enemy with the lowest health.
#Plasma: Gain 1(2 on #Evoke) #Energy.

Channel.text:
Summons an orb in your first empty #Orb Slot.
If you have no empty slots, your first [[Orb]] is automatically #Evoked to make room.

Orb Slot.text: Orbs can be channeled into these slots. The Defect starts with 3 slots, which can be increased with cards, relics, or potions.

Evoke.text: Consume your rightmost Orb and use its '''Evoke''' effect.

Lightning.text:
'''Passive:''' Deal 3 (+1 per #Focus) damage to a random enemy.
#Evoke: Deals 8 (+1 per #Focus) damage to a random enemy.

Dark.text:
'''Passive:''' Increases damage by 6 (+1 per #Focus) every turn.
'''Evoke:''' Deals damage to the enemy with the least HP equal to stored damage.

Equilibrium.text: Retain your hand for X turns.

Focus.text: Increases the effectiveness of #Channeled Orbs by X.

Lock-On.text: Receives 50% more damage from Orbs for X turns.

Rebound.text: The next card you play this turn is put on top of your draw pile.

Bias.text: At the start of your turn, lose X #Focus.

Draw.text: At the start of your turn, draw X additional cards.

Echo Form.text: The first X cards you play each turn are played twice.

Loop.text: At the start of your turn, trigger the passive ability of your next Orb X times.

Static Discharge.text: Whenever you receive attack damage, #Channel X #Lightning.

Repair.text: At the end of combat, heal X HP.

Stance.text:
You can only have one stance at a time.

'''Calm:''' Upon exiting this Stance, gain 2 @PE '''Energy'''

'''Wrath:''' In this Stance, you deal and receive double attack damage.

'''Divinity:''' Upon entering this Stance, gain 3 @PE '''Energy'''. Attacks deal triple damage.
Exit this Stance at the start of your next turn.

'''Empty:''' No effect.

Wrath.text: In this Stance, you deal and receive double attack damage.

Scry.text: Look at the top X cards of your draw pile. You may discard any of them.

Blasphemer.text: At the start of your turn, die.

Simmering Rage.text: Enter #Wrath at the start of your turn.

Wave of the Hand.text: Whenever you gain #Block, apply X #Weak to ALL enemies.

Deva.text: At the start of your turn, gain @PE X times and increase this gain by Y.

Devotion.text: At the start of your turn, gain X #Mantra.

Establishment.text: Whenever a card is #Retained, lower its cost by X.

Fasting.text: At the start of your turn, lose X @PE '''Energy'''.

Foresight.text: At the start of your turn, #Scry X.

Like Water.text: At the end of your turn, if you are in #Calm, gain X #Block.

Master Reality.text: Whenever a card is created, it is #Upgraded.

Rushdown.text: Whenever you enter #Wrath, draw X cards.

Omega.text: At the end of your turn, deal X damage to ALL enemies.

The Bomb.text: At the end of X turns, deal Y damage to ALL enemies.

Mayhem.text: At the start of your turn, play the top X cards of your draw pile.

Panache.text: If you play X more cards this turn, deal Y damage to ALL enemies.

Sadistic.text: Whenever you apply a debuff to a enemy, deal X damage.

Angry.text: Upon receiving attack damage, gains X #Strength.

Beat of Death.text: Whenever you play a card, take X damage.

Constricted.text: Take X damage at the end of your turn.

Curl Up.text: Gains X #Block upon first receiving attack damage.

Draw Reduction.text: Draw X less cards next turn.

Explosive.text: Explodes after X turns, dealing some amount of damage.

Flying.text: Takes 50% less attack damage. Cancelled if dealt attack damage X times in one turn. Resets charges at the start of next turn if not fully removed.

Invincible.text: Can only lose X more HP this turn.

Malleable.text: Upon receiving attack damage, gains X #Block. #Block gain increases as #Malleable is triggered. Resets at the start of your turn.

Minion.text: Minions abandon combat without their leader.

Reactive.text: Upon receiving attack damage, changes its [[Intent]].

Regenerate.text: At the end of its turn, heals X HP.

Shifting.text: Upon losing HP, loses that much #Strength until the end of the turn.

Split.text: When its HP is at or below 50%, it will split into 2 smaller Slimes with its current HP.

Stasis.text: On death, a stolen card is returned to your hand.

Strength Up.text: At the end of its turn, gains #Strength.

Surrounded.text: Receive 50% more damage if attacked from behind. Use targeting cards or potions to change your orientation.

Back Attack.text: Deals 50% more damage as it is attacking you from behind.

Thievery.text: Steals X [[Gold]] whenever it attacks. Stolen gold is returned if this enemy is killed.

Time Warp.text: Whenever you play a certain number of cards, ends your turn and gains X #Strength.

Draft.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Draft a starting deck of cards.

Sealed Deck.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Craft a deck from 30 random cards.

Hoarder.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Whenever you add a card to your deck, add two additional copies. You can no longer remove cards from your deck at the '''Merchant'''.

Insanity.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Start with a random deck of 50 cards.

Chimera.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Your starting deck is a fusion of all 4 characters.

Shiny.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Your starting deck is replaced with 1 of every rare card.

Specialized.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Start with 5 copies of a single card.

Vintage.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Normal Enemies drop relics instead of cards.

Controlled Chaos.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Start with '''Frozen Eye'''. At the start of your turn, add 10 random cards to the bottom of your draw pile.

Diverse.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Cards are not restricted by your character.

Red Cards.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Red cards now appear in rewards and shops.

Green Cards.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Green cards now appear in rewards and shops.

Blue Cards.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Blue cards now appear in rewards and shops.

Purple Cards.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Purple cards now appear in rewards and shops.

Colorless Cards.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Colorless cards now appear in rewards and shops.

Heirloom.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Start with one 1 Rare relic.

Time Dilation.text: '''Daily Modifier''': All enemies start with the '''Slow''' debuff.

Flight.text: '''Daily Modifier''': You may ignore paths when choosing the next room to travel to.

Deadly Events.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Unknown rooms can now contain Elites but are also more likely to contain Treasure Rooms.

Binary.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Card rewards contain only two cards.

Cursed Run.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Whenever you defeat a Boss, become '''Cursed'''. Your starting relic is replaced by '''Cursed Key''', '''Darkstone Periapt''', and '''Du-Vu Doll'''.

Big Game Hunter.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Elites are now swarming the Spire and drop better rewards.

Lethality.text: '''Daily Modifier''': You start each combat with +3 '''Strength'''. All enemies start each combat with +3 '''Strength'''.

Midas.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Enemies drop 200% more Gold, but you cannot Upgrade cards at Rest Sites.

Night Terrors.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Resting at Rest Sites heals 100% of your HP, but costs 5 max HP.

Terminal.text: '''Daily Modifier''': Whenever you enter a new room, lose 1 max HP. Start each combat with 5 '''Plated Armor'''.

Certain Future.text: '''Daily Modifier''': The map only contains one path.

Endless.text: '''Custom Modifier''': Winning will return you to Act 1 with the same deck. But beware, the blight eventually consumes all...

Daily Mods.text: '''Custom Modifier''': Embark on a run with exactly 3 random Daily Mods.

Blight Chests.text: '''Custom Modifier''': Boss chests contain Blights after beating Act 3 on Endless.

Praise Snecko.text: '''Custom Modifier''': Replaces your starting relic with '''Snecko Eye'''.

Inception.text: '''Custom Modifier''': Replaces your starting relic with '''Unceasing Top'''.

My True Form.text: '''Custom Modifier''': Start with a copy of '''Demon Form''', '''Wraith Form''', '''Echo Form''', and '''Deva Form'''.

One Hit Wonder.text: '''Custom Modifier''': Start the game with 1 max HP.

Starter Deck.text: '''Custom Modifier''': Start with '''Busted Crown''' and Binary, so enemies no longer drop cards.

Uncertain Future.text: '''Removed Modifier''': The map now only shows Unknown rooms.

Brewmaster.text: '''Removed Modifier''': Start with '''White Beast Statue''' and 5 copies of '''Alchemize'''.

Careless.text: '''Removed Modifier''': At the beginning of your turn, discard the top card of your draw pile.

Colossus.text: '''Removed Modifier''': Enemies now have more HP but drop better rewards.

Restless Journey.text: '''Removed Modifier''': The player no longer heals to full health when entering new Acts.

Heartbreaker.text: '''Removed Modifier''': Enables the Final Act. (Renamed to 'The Ending')

Red Energy.text: The [[Ironclad]]'s Energy orb. Energy is a resource used to play cards.

Green Energy.text: The [[Silent]]'s Energy orb. Energy is a resource used to play cards.

Blue Energy.text: The [[Defect]]'s Energy orb. Energy is a resource used to play cards.

Purple Energy.text: The [[Watcher]]'s Energy orb. Energy is a resource used to play cards.

Colorless Energy.text: The generic Energy icon found on all Colorless cards. Energy is a resource used to play cards.
